{{CargoOrgan
|name=Demon Spine
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10842
|idx=47
|description=Even the powerful Demon Gods have to pay a heavy price against Earth's Will. The countless wounds on this spine are proofs of that gruesome battle.
|skill=
|hp=1070
|def=213
|atk=174
|rush=137
|gene1=In explorations, Zombie Cells gained +4%
|gene2=In explorations, Demon Cells gained +4%
|gene3=Demon God Cabin Output +5%
|gene4={race} ATK +8 per Cell Furnace level-up
Cell Furnace LVL upgraded: 20/20
|gene7=Demon God Cabin Output +10% (Awakened)
|}}
